chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application D-22 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 06-08-2025. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy P.G for the State. ******** Learned DPG submits copy of diary sheet that proceedings in the matter before the trial Court are abated against the respondent No. 1. No one has perused the instant matter since few dates; as such the same is dismissed for non prosecution. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
